description.value: Even while otherwise preoccupied, you can dedicate some of your brains to scanning your environment for threats. You can cast scan environment as a primal innate cantrip at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. You can cast this innate cantrip even while performing other tasks, such as resting, traveling, talking, fighting, or even casting other spells, but not while sleeping or otherwise @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious]. Additionally, once per day when you cast scan environment, you can change its casting time to 1 round instead of 10 minutes.
